title: pilocarpus pauciflorus
intro: Pilocarpus pauciflorus is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as a medicinal shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Pilocarpus pauciflorus has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant's extracts and essential oils are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Pilocarpus pauciflorus is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
